tooltips.setting: Open the menu to access your settings.
tooltips.refresh: Tap here to refresh your data.
tooltips.qr: Tap here to scan a QR code.
tooltips.request_credential: Tap here to request a new credential.
tooltips.add_connection: Tap here to add a new connection.
tooltips.download: Download this credential to your device.
tooltips.share: Share this credential securely via email or other apps.
tooltips.delete: Permanently delete this credential from your wallet.

PreferenceScreen.title: Select Country & Language
PreferenceScreen.sub_title: Please select your country and language

RecoveryPhraseScreen.text_info_1: The secret phrase is the master key to your account.
RecoveryPhraseScreen.text_info_2: You can use this phrase to recover your account.
RecoveryPhraseScreen.text_info_3: Please copy and keep it in a safe place.

VerifyOTPScreen.title: We've just sent you a verification code
VerifyOTPScreen.sub_title_1: We just sent you the verification code to

ConnectionListScreen.title: Create Connections
ConnectionListScreen.sub_title: Select the organisations from which you want to receive Credentials.

EmptyConnections.secure_message: All your connections are secure and encrypted.
EmptyConnections.title: No Connections Yet
EmptyConnections.label_1: You haven't connected with any organizations.
EmptyConnections.label_2: 👉 Tap the + button to search and connect with schools, hospitals, employers, or other organizations. Once connected, they can send you digital Credentials directly to your wallet.

SecurityScreen.title: Be Secure
SecurityScreen.sub_title: Using biometric and pincode security significantly reduces the chances your account will be compromised in case your phone is lost or stolen.

PincodeScreen.title: Enter a new six-digit PIN.
PincodeScreen.sub_title: This pin is required when sharing your data
PincodeScreen.confirm_pin_sub_title: Re-enter PIN that you have entered on previous screen.
PincodeScreen.alert_message: Your pincode is set successfully. Please keep it safe and secure.

NotifyMeScreen.title: Get notified
NotifyMeScreen.sub_title: We use push notifications to deliver messages for important events, such as when you receive a new digital Credential.

ActionsScreen.empty_list_text: There are no actions to complete, Please scan a QR code to either get a digital Credential or to prove it.
ActionsScreen.notification_alert_message: Notifications are disabled. You will not be able to receive alerts for the actions. Pull down to refresh and receive the latest actions.

CredentialsScreen.all_certificates_empty_list_text: There are no Credentials in your wallet. Please check the Actions Tab for any Credentials Offers or tap the "+" button at the bottom right to request a Credential.
CredentialsScreen.groups_empty_list_text: There are no Credential groups in your wallet. Create first by clicking on plus button
CredentialsScreen.group_name_error_message: Group name should contain at least 2 characters
CredentialsScreen.select_credential_error_message: Please select at least one Credential

EmptyCredentials.title: No Credentials Yet
EmptyCredentials.message: Your wallet is empty. Check the Actions tab for available offers, or tap + below to request your first Credential.

EmptyGroupCredentials.title: No Group Created
EmptyGroupCredentials.message: Organize your certificates into groups for easier access. Tap + below to create your first group.

QRScreen.title: Point your camera to a QR code to scan
QRScreen.no_access_camera: Camera can't open. Please allow camera access in ZADA app info to continue.

ContactUsScreen.title: For questions and support, don’t hesitate to contact us on any of the following:

AboutUsScreen.text_1: ZADA is a Digital Identity Technology Company, driven to ensure everyone can provide and use digital services without risk for fraud or privacy intrusion.
AboutUsScreen.text_2: Using ZADA, you are in full control of your data. You decide what you want to receive and what you want to share with who.
AboutUsScreen.text_3: ZADA is leading a revolution in how personal information is managed, and by using ZADA you are part of this change!
AboutUsScreen.text_4: To contribute back to the community, the ZADA App is created as an open source project, originally created by Trustnet Pakistan, so other companies that want to launch a wallet on ZADA Network also can do that.
AboutUsScreen.text_5: ZADA is not just an app but an ecosystem, a network, and a mission to ensure everyone can provide and use digital services without risk for fraud or privacy intrusion!

VerificationRequestScreen.title: ZADA Secure Verification
VerificationRequestScreen.label: Please review the request below to share your information.
VerificationRequestScreen.footer: Powered by ZADA • Your data is encrypted and only shared with your consent.
VerificationRequestScreen.description: It looks like you don’t have any Credentials available for this verification. What you can do:
VerificationRequestScreen.description_1: Go to the Credentials tab to claim or request one.
VerificationRequestScreen.description_2: If your organization provides it, connect with them and accept the Credential under Actions.

errors.countryNotSupported: Your connection appears to be blocked. Please try to disable any VPN, check your internet connection, and try again. If the issue persists, contact support for assistance.
errors.info_pincode: You didn't set your pincode yet. Please click below button to set your {{max}} digit pincode
errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalid_pincode: You entered incorrect pincode. Please check your pincode and try again
errors.invalid_old_pincode: You entered wrong old pincode. Please enter the correct.
errors.required_account_deletion: Please set your EMAIL in order to continue with account deletion.
errors.length_name: Please enter a name between {{min}}-{{max}} alphabetical characters long. No numbers or special characters.
errors.length_current_password: Password length should be {{min}} to {{max}} characters
errors.length_new_password: Password length should be {{min}} to {{max}} characters
errors.length_old_pincode: Old pincode should contain only {{max}} digits
errors.length_new_pincode: New pincode should contain only {{max}} digits.
errors.length_confirm_pincode: Confirm pincode should contain only {{max}} digits.
errors.new_pincode_confirm_not_match: New pincode and confirm pincode should be same
errors.password_not_match: New Password and Confirm Password should be same
errors.pincode_confirm_not_match: Pincode and confirm pincode are not same. Please check them carefully
errors.biometric_not_supported: Please ensure your device has Biometric/FaceID and is configured correctly, then try again.
errors.something_went_wrong: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.error_400: Bad Request – The server could not understand the request.
errors.error_403: Your connection is blocked because a VPN or proxy was detected. Please turn off your VPN and try again.
errors.error_404: Not Found – The requested resource could not be found.
errors.error_500: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.verification_fail_message: Failed to verify the QR code. Please try again.
errors.verification_fail_message_1: An error occurred while processing the QR code. Please try again.
errors.no_internet_message: Please check your internet connection and try again.

messages.delete_account: Do you want to DELETE your account?
messages.delete_request: Are you sure you want to delete this request?
messages.delete_certificate: Are you sure you want to delete this Credential?
messages.logout: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
messages.receiving_certificate: Please wait! we are receiving your Credential this may take around ~10 seconds...
messages.verifying_certificate: Please wait! we are verifying your Credential this may take around ~10 seconds...
messages.creating_connection: Please wait! we are creating a connection this may take around ~10 seconds...
messages.success_verification_request_submit: Verification request has been submitted successfully
messages.success_verification_request: Your verification request is fulfilled successfully.
messages.connection_already_exists_message: Connection with {{organizationName}} has already been created
messages.connection_fail_message: Failed to request connection. Please try again.
messages.success_certificate: You have received a Credential successfully.
messages.success_claim_credential: Request for Credential has been submitted. It will be delivered shortly.
messages.delete_connection_message: Are you sure you want to delete this Connection?
messages.credential_exit: You cannot delete this Connection because it has associated Credentials.
messages.action_exit: You cannot delete this Connection because it has associated Actions.

sea_wallet.empty_action_list: You don't have any actions yet.
